zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Cheyne於1345年出生在英國史洛普爾通時，她的父親Roger de Cheyne II25歲，母親Isolda De Cheyne II20歲。她和Sir Lawrence Hawberk至少有1個女兒。她去世於1382年在英國享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Cheyne was born in 1345, in Tong, Shropshire, England, her father, Roger de Cheyne II, was 25 and her mother, Isolda De Cheyne II, was 20. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir Lawrence Hawberk. She died in 1382, in England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Cheyne est née en 1345, à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Cheyne II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isolda De Cheyne II, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir Lawrence Hawberk. Elle est décédée en 1382, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Cheyne 1345 in Tong, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Cheyne II 25 und ihre Mutter Isolda De Cheyne II 20. Sie hatte mit Sir Lawrence Hawberk mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1382 im Alter von 37 Jahren in England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Cheyneが1345年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングで生まれた時，父Roger de Cheyne IIは25歳，母Isolda De Cheyne IIは20歳であった。彼女はSir Lawrence Hawberkとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1382年にイギリスで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Cheyne(이)가 1345년 영국 슈럽실르 탕에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Cheyne II(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolda De Cheyne II(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir Lawrence Hawberk(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1382년 영국에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Cheyne родилась в 1345 г. в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Cheyne II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda De Cheyne II, 20. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir Lawrence Hawberk. Она умерла в 1382 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 37 лет.
